headline: Fed’s Waller says Middle East war may drive up inflation, complicate rate cuts
summary: Investing.com -- Federal Reserve Governor Christopher Waller said Friday the Middle East War is likely to drive up inflation near term and creates a challenging outlook for monetary policymakers, although he said a fast end to the troubles would keep the door open to cutting interest rates again later this year.

raw.headline: Fed’s Waller says Middle East war may drive up inflation, complicate rate cuts
raw.summary: Investing.com -- Federal Reserve Governor Christopher Waller said Friday the Middle East War is likely to drive up inflation near term and creates a challenging outlook for monetary policymakers, although he said a fast end to the troubles would keep the door open to cutting interest rates again later this year.

headline: Traders put $760 mln in bets on falling oil ahead of Iran’s Hormuz announcement
summary: Investing.com -- Investors placed a bet worth about $760 million on a falling oil price around 20 minutes before Iran’s foreign minister announced on Friday that the Strait of Hormuz was open, another sizeable wager on the world’s most traded commodity ahead of major announcements in the course of the Middle East war.

headline: Bitcoin vs. gold: Safe-haven debate remains unclear after Iran shock
summary: Investing.com -- The conflict between the U.S., Israel and Iran produced one of the most significant geopolitical shocks to markets since 2022, yet the safe-haven debate between Bitcoin and gold remains unresolved, according to new analysis from Capital.com.

headline: Colgate-Palmolive (CL) Earnings Expected to Grow: Should You Buy?

headline: Procter & Gamble Pre-Q3 Earnings: Wise to Buy It Before the Release?
summary: PG heads into Q3 earnings release, with sales and EPS seen rising, but tariffs, commodity costs and a premium valuation could pressure margins.

headline: Colgate-Palmolive Webcasts 2026 First Quarter Earnings Conference Call May 1, 2026 – 8:30 a.m. ET
summary: NEW YORK, April 17, 2026--Colgate-Palmolive Company (NYSE:CL) will provide a live webcast of its 2026 first quarter earnings conference call on Friday, May 1, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET. The call will be hosted by Chairman, President and CEO, Noel Wallace, Chief Financial Officer, Stan Sutula, Executive Vice President, Investor Relations, Claire Ross, and Executive Vice President, M&A and Special Projects, John Faucher. headline: JP Morgan Maintains Overweight on Colgate-Palmolive, Lowers Price Target to $95
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Andrea Teixeira   maintains Colgate-Palmolive (NYSE:CL) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $97 to $95.

headline: FOMO is what is driving stocks to new highs, Barclays says
summary: Investing.com -- Equity markets are climbing to fresh highs largely because investors are being pulled in by fear of missing out, according to a new note from Barclays.
